prompt: Translate this English proverb into two other languages in a way that preserves the spirit, not the words: 'The best time to plant a tree was twenty years ago. The second best time is now.' Add a one-sentence note on each.
response:
French: Le meilleur moment pour planter un arbre était il y a vingt ans. Le deuxième meilleur moment est maintenant.
Note: This translation focuses on the idea of taking action now rather than delaying, even if the ideal time has passed.

Korean: 나무를 심는 가장 좋은 시기는 20년 전이었다. 두 번째로 좋은 시기는 지금이다.
Note: The Korean version maintains the core concept of not putting things off, but also implies that even if we can't change the past, we can still make a positive impact in the present.
